final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output [7:0] data_out
);

    reg [7:0] reg_data;  // 8-bit register

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            reg_data <= 8'b00000000;  // Reset the register to 0
        end else if (load) begin
            reg_data <= data_in;  // Load data into the register
        end
    end

    assign data_out = reg_data;

endmodule
